plan_type_rationale: User explicitly requested phased plan mode for a multi-stage scanner refactor with sequential gates and characterization coverage.
goal: Split the scanner into focused modules without changing the public scanCurrentElements() contract.

plan_adjustments_needed.description: Keep scanner.ts as the stable export surface while moving implementation details into new modules.
Sequence the work as characterization first, extraction second, orchestration last, with a final parity checkpoint.

hard_stops.reason: Final regression and parity checkpoint before the refactor is considered complete.
hard_stops.approval_basis: User verified CLI end-to-end on LLOYD (94 elements detected). Baseline 132 pass / 5 fail matches pre-refactor.

completion.p8_note: Phase 8 parity verification subsumed into P9 regression commit (f853246) rather than a standalone commit. Both P0 spec-lock guards (customPatterns no-leak, parallel==sequential dedupe parity) green after P6.
commits: ae3b64a P5+P6 slim orchestration + kill global mutation
f853246 P9 cleanup + final regression (also covers P8 parity)

phases.name: Characterization
phases.description: Lock current scanner behavior before moving code.

tasks.description: Review scanner.ts and the existing scanner-focused tests to map the current behavior surface.
Add characterization tests for recursive versus non-recursive discovery, exclude handling, custom patterns, and deduplication.
Add characterization tests for progress callbacks, incremental cache behavior, AST fallback, tree-sitter fallback, and sequential versus parallel parity.

phases.name: Pure Utilities
phases.description: Extract pattern, dedupe, and comment helpers without changing behavior.

tasks.description: Create src/scanner/scanner-patterns.ts and move LANGUAGE_PATTERNS, DEFAULT_SUPPORTED_LANGS, DEFAULT_EXCLUDE_PATTERNS, TYPE_PRIORITY, and sortPatternsByPriority().
Create src/scanner/scanner-dedupe.ts and move deduplicateElements().
Create src/scanner/scanner-comments.ts and move isLineCommented() plus its helper functions.

phases.name: File Discovery
phases.description: Extract recursive discovery and exclusion logic.

tasks.description: Create src/scanner/scanner-file-discovery.ts with shouldExcludePath() and collectFiles().
Keep path normalization and tsx/jsx language remapping identical while routing scanner.ts through the new discovery module.

phases.name: File Runner
phases.description: Extract per-file execution into a structured result contract.

tasks.description: Create src/scanner/scanner-file-runner.ts with scanSingleFile() returning elements, cacheEntry, status, and currentFile.
Unify the scan cache hit path, tree-sitter path, AST path, regex path, and error path inside the file runner.

phases.name: Runtime Bookkeeping
phases.description: Move shared progress and cache helpers out of the main loop.

tasks.description: Create src/scanner/scanner-runtime.ts with reportProgress(), storeFileCacheEntry(), resolveScanLanguages(), and buildResolvedPatternMap().
Remove duplicated progress and cache update logic from scanCurrentElements() and route it through the runtime helpers.
Normalize options, resolve languages and patterns, collect files, run the incremental diff, choose parallel or sequential execution, persist cache, dedupe, and return from scanCurrentElements().
Verify the public scanCurrentElements() signature, default options, and returned element shape remain unchanged.

phases.name: No Global Mutation
phases.description: Remove scan-time mutation of shared defaults.

tasks.description: Stop mutating LANGUAGE_PATTERNS inside scanCurrentElements() and build per-call resolved patterns from built-ins, registry patterns, and custom patterns.
Keep ScannerRegistry working by reading from resolved state instead of relying on shared mutable defaults.

phases.name: Scanner Simplification
phases.description: Revisit the Scanner class and remove stale internal state.

tasks.description: Shrink Scanner to a simple aggregation helper or replace it with plain collection helpers.
Remove unused Scanner fields such as currentFile, currentLine, and currentPattern, plus any stale private route helpers that are fully superseded.

phases.name: Parity
phases.description: Align worker and main-thread execution paths.

tasks.description: Verify parallel and sequential execution produce the same elements, dedupe results, progress events, cache updates, and AST richness.
Fix any parity gaps found between worker and main-thread execution.

phases.name: Cleanup
phases.description: Remove dead code, update references, and run the scanner-focused regression suite.

tasks.description: Remove dead imports, unreachable code, and obsolete helper paths after the extraction is complete.
Update docs and examples that reference scanner internals so they match the new module layout.
Run the scanner-focused regression tests and record any remaining contract gaps before closing the workorder.
